name: Pineapple-Glazed Carrots
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the carrots into desired shapes and sizes.
2. Place the carrots in a pot with a small amount of water and salt. Cover and cook until tender.
3. Drain the cooked carrots.
4. Add the pineapple tidbits, orange rind, brown sugar, cinnamon, and butter to the carrots.
5. Mix gently until all ingredients are well combined.
6. Spread the mixture over medium heat.
7. Toss lightly until the carrots are glazed, about 5 minutes.
8. Serve 5-6 people.
